title: New In Town Chinese Translation
description: New In Town Sinicized Resource Pack, a translated version based on the original content, perfectly adapted to the original resource pack
body:
**New In Town localization package**

**Introduction:**
The New In Town localization package is committed to providing a comprehensive Chinese localization experience for the original New In Town data package. New In Town is a deeply immersive settler experience mod that allows you to establish, develop, and defend your settlement in Minecraft while combating threats from the lower world. The localization package aims to enable Chinese players to better understand various elements in the game and enjoy a smoother gaming experience.

**Features:**
-Chinese interface: Most of the game interface, menus, prompts, and text have been translated into Chinese, making the game easier to understand and operate.
-Continuous improvement: Although there are still some English interfaces available, we are working hard to improve localization and ensure that every detail presents the best results for Chinese players.
-Community Support: We welcome player feedback. If you find any untranslated parts or translation errors, please inform us through our channels to help us continuously improve.

**Attention:**
-At present, the localization package is still in the development stage, and some text and functions may not have been fully localized. Please stay tuned for future updates.
-Please ensure that your version of Minecraft is compatible with the New In Town package to avoid any potential issues in the game.

**Original author and acknowledgements:**
The original author of the New In Town package is Kanokarob, which can be found in [Modrinth's New In Town](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-in-town) Found the original data package. Thank you to the original author for creating such wonderful content, and also thank you to the hard work of the localization team, which has made this game experience more accessible to Chinese players.

**Download and Install:**
Please visit our official download page to obtain the latest version of the localization package. Before installation, please carefully read the installation guide to ensure that your game environment is configured correctly.
